description: Evals for the eval-runner skill — covers eval case authoring, running evals, and reporting pass/fail results.

evals.name: write-evals-for-skill
evals.prompt: Write eval cases for the frontend-builder skill.
evals.expected_output: A JSON eval file with at least 3 cases targeting frontend-builder. Each case has a realistic prompt, specific expected_output description, and covers at least one happy path (add a React page), one component creation case, and one API integration case.

evals.name: run-eval-and-report
evals.prompt: Run the eval cases for the database-designer skill and report the results.
evals.expected_output: A pass/fail report listing each eval case by id and name, with a pass/fail status and brief notes explaining why each case passed or failed. At least one case should be evaluated.

evals.name: add-assertions-to-eval
evals.prompt: Add assertions to this eval case: id=1, prompt='Create a users table with email and password fields', expected_output='SQL DDL for users table with id, email, password_hash, created_at, updated_at columns'
evals.expected_output: The eval case augmented with an assertions array containing at least 2 assertion objects (type + value), such as contains 'CREATE TABLE users', contains 'created_at', not_contains 'TODO'.
